project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 music discovery web app with App Router
build_system: bun (package manager), Next.js build system. No special quirks. AGENTS.md warns to check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for breaking changes in this version.
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test scripts in package.json)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bun run lint' - zero errors. 2. Run 'bun run build' - zero errors, all routes compile. 3. Verify responsive design patterns used. 4. Ensure semantic HTML and ARIA labels on all sections.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker needed. bun is available for speed.
contribution_requirements: Zero TypeScript errors, zero lint errors, build succeeds, responsive layouts, loading/empty/error states, no console.log in production, semantic HTML, accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA), use Lucide React for icons, follow design token system (no hardcoded colors), 8-point grid spacing, glass hierarchy levels as defined in globals.css, Next.js App Router best practices with Server Components preferred.
key_patterns: Components in app/components/ (54+ files). Services in lib/. Client components marked with 'use client'. Server Components preferred. Glass hierarchy: glass-subtle, glass-light, glass-medium, glass-heavy, glass-ultra. Motion tokens: --duration-micro/standard/complex/page with --ease-spring/smooth/bounce. Design tokens in globals.css and @theme inline block. Images via next/image with remotePatterns configured for mzstatic.com, lastfm.freetls.fastly.net, i.scdn.co, img.youtube.com, i.ytimg.com. Premium transitions via 'transition-premium' class. Animations: animate-fade-in, animate-slide-up, animate-scale-in, animate-blur-in, animate-on-scroll-*. Card interactions: card-tilt, hover-glow. Lucide React for all icons.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - 57 reusable UI components. app/api/ - API routes (spotify, youtube, recommendations, lyrics). lib/ - service layer (iTunes, Spotify, Last.fm, YouTube, discovery, AI). types/ - additional TypeScript types. public/ - static assets.
